Title

Description

Visible in the user panel

**Refining Calendar Logic**

I'm now integrating calendar functionality using `useMemo` for dynamic month/year data. I'm calculating the number of days, empty slots, total registered, and installed applications for the selected month and year using a date string. I am focusing on ensuring all data for each day is correct and aligned.

```xml
<changes>
  <change>
    <file>src/components/Calendar/Calendar.tsx</file>
    <description>Implement calendar with dynamic month/year data</description>
    <content><![CDATA[[selectedMonth, setSelectedMonth] = useState(currentMonth);
    const [selectedYear, setSelectedYear] = useState(currentYear);

    const { calendarDays, emptySlots, totalRegistered, totalInstalled } = useMemo(() => {
        const daysInMonth = new Date(selectedYear, selectedMonth, 0).getDate();
        const firstDayIndex = new Date(selectedYear, selectedMonth - 1, 1).getDay(); // 0 = Sun, 1 = Mon...
        
        const days = [];
        let regTotal = 0;
        let instTotal = 0;

        for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
            const dateStr = `${selectedYear}-${String(selectedMonth).padStart(2, '0')}-${String(day).padStart(2, '0')}`;
            
            // Registered: based on dateOfApplication
            const registeredCount = subscribers.filter(sub => sub.dateOfApplication === dateStr).length;
            
            // Installed: based on activationDate and status 'Installed'
            const installedCount = subscribers.filter(sub => sub.status === 'Installed' && sub.activationDate === dateStr).length;

            days.push({
                day,
                dateStr,
                registeredCount,
                installedCount
            });
            regTotal += registeredCount;
            instTotal += installedCount;
        }

        const emptySlots = Array(firstDayIndex).fill(null);
        return {
            calendarDays: days,
            emptySlots,
            totalRegistered: regTotal,
            totalInstalled: instTotal
        };
    }, [selectedMonth, selectedYear, subscribers]);]]></content>
  </change>
</changes>
```
